title: VeinMine Resourcepack
description: A complimentary resourcepack for my VeinMine Datapack
body:
## Summary
The resourcepack uses the Diminishing Tools Textures of the Vanilla Tweaks Texturepack seperatly downloadable here: https://vanillatweaks.net/share#vjnjcl
Additionally it includes the added Custom Item textures for my VeinMine Datapack.

![netherite_tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ff5ad93cf2799dca06af10c14a462d7452677b6.png)

# The Datapack
[https://modrinth.com/datapack/veinminer-datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/veinminer-datapack)
